name: codegen-bridge
description: Bridge to Codegen AI agent platform — execute implementation plans via cloud agents

skills.name: executing-via-codegen
skills.description: Delegate implementation plans to Codegen cloud agents — one task per agent run with automatic context enrichment and progress tracking.

agents.name: codegen-executor
agents.description: Orchestrates multi-task plan execution via Codegen cloud agents. Creates agent runs, monitors progress, handles failures, and collects PR links.

on_run_complete.description: Triggered when an agent run completes — logs result summary and PR links.

on_run_failed.description: Triggered when an agent run fails — logs error details and prompts for recovery action.

on_run_paused.description: Triggered when an agent run pauses for user input — surfaces the agent's question.

default_model.description: Default LLM model for agent runs. null = use organization default.

auto_monitor.description: Automatically poll agent runs after creation.
